comment: The dress is great! Very classy and comfortable. It fit perfectly! I'm 5'7" and 130 pounds. I am a 34B chest. This dress would be too long for those who are shorter but could be hemmed. I wouldn't recommend it for those big chested as I am smaller chested and it fit me perfectly. The underarms were not too wide and the dress was made well.

I loved this dress so much as soon as I tried it on I knew I had to buy it in another color. I am 5'3 about 155lbs and I carry all my weight in my upper body. When I put it on I felt like it thinned me put and I got so many compliments.
I loved this dress so much as soon as I tried it on I knew I had to buy it in another color. I am 5'3 about 155lbs and I carry all my weight in my upper body.
Absolutely love this product! It exceeded all my expectations. The quality is top-notch and it arrived quickly.
Good product overall but the sizing runs a bit large. I had to exchange for a smaller size. Customer service was helpful.
Perfect fit and beautiful color. I've received so many compliments wearing this. Will definitely buy again!
Really nice quality. The material is soft and comfortable. Looks exactly like the photos. I'm very satisfied.
The color was slightly different from what was shown online. Otherwise the quality seems fine. A bit disappointed with the color mismatch.
